creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
How do I resolve a PRs that are old or invalid? 

Options available are: 

Needs Help
In Discussion
Issue Resolved ->  FIXED / As Intended / DUPLICATE

There seems to be no "REJECTED" or "INVALID" type options. What should we do in the event we need to close a really old PR that has been superseded by newer functionality in the ports tree?
